## CCDR: Volume 50-3/4, March/April 2024: Innovations in Public Health Surveillance
CCDR Advanced search
- Information for authors
Summary of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) Updated Guidance on Influenza Vaccination During Pregnancy W Siu, A Sinilaite, J Papenburg on behalf of the National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
Innovations in public health surveillance: An overview of novel use of data and analytic methods H Rilkoff, S Struck, C Ziegler, L Faye, D Paquette, D Buckeridge

Impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on inbound air travel to Canada V Gabriele-Rivet, E Rees, A Rahman, RM Milwid
